description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Staging that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: stage-release and stage-docker-release. The stage-release job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of targets and containers, checks out the repository, configures the environment, sets up dependencies, builds and packages the project, and uploads the artifact. The stage-docker-release job depends on stage-release, downloads the binaries, unpacks them, and builds a Docker image.
